title: Nightclub Bar Conversation Photo
sourceTitle: Vs Midjourney V8 1 Chatting Prompt Gpt

imagePrompts.prompt:
A medium shot of two young people standing at a nightclub bar counter facing each other, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. They are mid-conversation — holding eye contact a beat longer than necessary, both with a slight almost-smile that hasn't fully decided what it is yet.
East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners — the eye contact direct and aware. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10–NC20). Skin subsurface scattering visible under warm overhead bar light, specular micro-highlights on her nose ridge and the top of her cheekbones, fine foundation powder grain perceptible. She wears a sheer black mesh long-sleeve top over a black bralette — the transparency subtle in some lights, obvious in others. He stands opposite her, one elbow on the counter, a drink in hand, dark fitted jacket. Two or three stray hairs cross her cheek, displaced by faint air movement, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical.
Mixed artificial light sources — warm amber pendant light hangs directly above the counter casting a concentrated glow between them. A deep red neon sign glow bleeds in from the left edge of frame, painting a thin line across her shoulder. Backlit spirit bottles line the shelves behind the bar. The mood is self-possessed and cool — a steady charged look, urban edge. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 3:2. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.
